message:
revert(scheduler): restore arena check and dedup in schedule_local_push

Restore the arena-guarded uniqueness check in LocalQueue::
schedule_local_push. A previous commit removed the O(N) contains()
check assuming the scheduler execution loop would handle duplicate
TaskId polls, but this turns out to be incorrect — without the arena
validity check, scheduling a task whose arena slot has been freed
can corrupt the queue. The contains() check is also restored to
prevent duplicate entries that waste poll cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
